tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Waking up to morning light on tangled sheets
Coffee stains and open windows summer breeze
Every little moment feels like all I need
Hallelujah for the simple things

[Pre-Chorus]
I don't need a reason to be grateful
Just this sunrise painting gold across the sky
Every breath a prayer that's beautiful
Hallelujah, I'm alive

[Chorus]
Hallelujah for the golden mornings
Hallelujah for the way you smile
Every day's a gift that keeps on pouring
Hallelujah, stay a while
Hallelujah, hallelujah
Stay a while

[Verse 2]
Barefoot in the garden, hands inside the dirt
Laughing at the rain that ruins Sunday shirts
Nothing lasts forever but it doesn't hurt
Hallelujah for what summer brings

[Chorus]
Hallelujah for the golden mornings
Hallelujah for the way you smile
Every day's a gift that keeps on pouring
Hallelujah, stay a while
Hallelujah, hallelujah
Stay a while

[Bridge]
Let the world spin fast outside our door
We've got everything and nothing more
Just this moment, just this light
Everything is gonna be alright

[Outro]
Hallelujah, hallelujah
Stay a while, stay a while
